error_signature: tool_use ids were found without tool_result blocks
title: AI Agent tool_use without corresponding tool_result
symptom: The AI Agent node throws an error indicating that tool_use IDs are present without corresponding tool_result blocks, preventing the workflow from executing properly.
not_this_if: No tool calls are present in the workflow
root_cause: The AI Agent retains memory of previous tool calls, which can lead to errors if the expected tool_result blocks are not present in subsequent messages. This can occur even after modifying or removing tools from the workflow.
fix_steps: Access the Redis database used by n8n
Clear the memory associated with the AI Agent
agent_instruction: Clear the AI Agent's memory in Redis to resolve the tool_use and tool_result mismatch.
